title: Learn about Newfoundland and Labrador - Canada.ca
content:
## Learn about Newfoundland and Labrador
Newfoundland and Labrador is Canada's most eastern province. It’s 1 of Canada’s 4 Atlantic provinces. It’ is made up of two 2 parts:
- Newfoundland, an island in the Atlantic Ocean
- Labrador on mainland Canada
Newfoundland and Labrador is one of the best places in the world to live, study, and work because of its:
- modern transportation and conveniences
- worldwide reputation as a friendly place to live
- low crime rate (one of the lowest in North America)
- beautiful scenery, clean air, fresh water and wide open spaces
We are proud to be one of the safest and most welcoming places in the world to live and work.
Our people work hard but they also enjoy their families and communities. Throughout the year, communities all over the province have special events to celebrate:

## Services to help you settle in Newfoundland and Labrador
Newfoundland and Labrador offers many resources to help you prepare to live and work there. Find information on
- living and working in Newfoundland and Labrador
- myths and facts about Newfoundland and Labrador
- immigrating to Newfoundland and Labrador
You can also download The Way Forward: Immigration to Newfoundland and Labrador (PDF, 1.2 MB) to help you understand Newfoundland and Labrador.

## Resources for Francophone immigrants
- Fédération des Francophones de Terre-Neuve et du Labrador
